reviewTarget: 014 CocoIndex/rerank-sidecar deprecation arc — live repo surface across 4 runtimes + kept exceptions; verify nothing missed/broken (30 surfaces)

findingDetails.title: GEMINI.md routes to deleted CocoIndex tool
findingDetails.evidence: SEARCH ROUTING: use CocoIndex semantic search (mcp__cocoindex_code__search) for concept, similarity, implementation-pattern, and "how does this work" code discovery.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace with HYBRID policy (Code Graph + Grep) to match other 4 runtime routing docs.

findingDetails.title: skill-graph.json has stale system-rerank-sidecar references
findingDetails.evidence: Line 37: "system-rerank-sidecar," in system list; Line 144: "system-rerank-sidecar": 0.4 in siblings; Line 221-228: entire "system-rerank-sidecar" adjacency block; Line 232: "mcp-coco-index": 0.7 in depends_on; Line 239: "mcp-coco-index": 0.7 in enhances; Line 493-497: "system-rerank-sidecar" keywords including "localhost 8765 rerank"; Line 522: "mcp-coco-index" in hub_skills
findingDetails.recommendation: Regenerate skill-graph.json from scripts/ copy (which was recompiled) to remove all deleted skill references.

findingDetails.title: memory:manage declares removed ccc subcommands
findingDetails.evidence: Line 3: argument-hint includes ccc <status|reindex|feedback>; Line 19: VALIDATE mode list includes ccc; Line 25: error message lists ccc as valid mode; Line 40: action routing includes ccc; Line 168: ccc <sub> → CCC MODE (Section 16); Line 944: error message for unknown ccc subcommand
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove all ccc subcommand declarations and CCC MODE section (§16-17) as the ccc_* tools were removed in phase 002.

findingDetails.title: .gitignore has stale cocoindex_code entry
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove stale ignore entry for deleted directory.

findingDetails.title: embedder_pluggability.md §3 has obsolete ccc run-daemon command with obsolescence banner
findingDetails.evidence: Line 239: ps -eo pid,command | grep "ccc run-daemon" | grep -v grep; section has clear "⚠️ Obsolete as of the 014 CocoIndex deprecation" banner, but ccc-based commands and .venv/bin/ccc paths no longer exist.
findingDetails.recommendation: Consider removing or collapsing the obsolete system-code-graph columns entirely, or strengthen the banner warning.

findingDetails.title: doctor_deep-loop.yaml has forbidden target glob for coco databases
findingDetails.evidence: Line 97: "mcp_server/database/*coco*" in forbidden_targets list; vestigial since coco databases no longer exist.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the vestigial glob pattern as cleanup.

findingDetails.title: spec.md phase-map claims phases 002-012 complete despite residue
findingDetails.evidence: Phase-map table marks phases 002-012 as 'Complete' but iter-1 found 4 misses (F001-F004) and iter-2 found 2 P2s (F005-F006) that should have been cleaned in those phases
findingDetails.recommendation: Update the phase-map to reflect residue status or add a 'complete with known residue' qualifier to maintain traceability accuracy

findingDetails.title: Stale catalog entry claiming removed CCC integration capability
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the CCC integration section from the catalog or replace with a deprecation notice
findingDetails.evidence: Catalog references non-existent 07--ccc-integration directory; directory listing shows folder does not exist

findingDetails.title: Dead RERANK_ env var prefix in sidecar allowlist for removed feature
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove 'RERANK_' from the prefixes array in SIDECAR_ENV_ALLOWLIST
findingDetails.evidence: RERANK_ prefix still allowed but RERANKER_LOCAL was removed in 014 deprecation (system-spec-kit/SKILL.md:422 states flags are 'no longer wired')

findingDetails.title: Stale feature catalog claims deleted 07--ccc-integration directory
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the 07--ccc-integration section entirely (TOC entry + 3 feature entries) or replace with a deprecation note.

findingDetails.title: Misleading tool handler references to deleted lib/ccc/ paths
findingDetails.recommendation: Update handler map to reflect actual tree-sitter paths and remove the deleted integration doc reference.

findingDetails.title: Dead cross-references to deleted ccc_bridge_integration.md
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove these cross-references or replace with a note about the 002 decouple.

findingDetails.title: Vestigial RERANK_ env prefix in sidecar allowlist
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the RERANK_ prefix and evaluate whether the entire file is still needed (no active sidecar consumers).

findingDetails.title: Obsolete ccc path reference in session-start testing playbook
findingDetails.recommendation: Update to reflect tree-sitter readiness check or remove the ccc-specific assertion.
